usage: vibe kits opencode uninstall [-h] [--home HOME] [--dry-run] [--yes]

options:
  -h, --help   show this help message and exit
  --home HOME  Target config base directory (default: $XDG_CONFIG_HOME or
               current user's home)
  --dry-run    Show changes without writing files
  --yes, -y    Apply without interactive confirmation
